meta.title: TP Club | Crypto Education Community for Chinese Australians
meta.description: Join TP Club — Australia's Mandarin crypto education community. Free Telegram access, beginner-friendly education, and 500+ active learners.

compliance: For Educational Purposes Only — All content is for learning. Not financial or investment advice.

hero.sub: Built for Chinese Australians. Daily crypto education, Mandarin-speaking support, beginner onboarding, and a private Telegram community focused on learning, not hype.
hero.caption: After clicking, Telegram opens and you can join the free TP Club education group with pinned beginner guides first.
hero.telegramProof: TP Club_止盈社 · 1,000+ members · Active learning group
deskItems: How to understand market structure from an education-first perspective
How volatility and risk concepts affect beginners
How to ask safer questions before making personal decisions
hero.mockupAlt: TP Club Telegram education community preview
hero.modalTitle: Join Telegram to unlock the full learning room
hero.modalText: Join Telegram to view the full community, pinned guides, chart education, market insights, beginner lessons, and all education content in one place.

how.title: How to Get Started
how.sub: Three simple steps to join TP Club and access beginner-friendly education resources

steps.d: Start with the private Telegram education group. No experience required, no pressure, and no financial advice.

steps.t: Ask Questions and Get Learning Support
steps.d: Introduce your learning goals, ask beginner questions, and get support inside the group.
Follow the instructor's education guidance, learn step by step, and develop a clearer understanding of crypto education concepts. We never access or manage your funds.

bundle.title: Your Complete Member Bundle
bundle.sub: Everything below is included free when you join the education community

items.d: A structured learning framework that helps members understand trends and market education concepts.
Daily education breakdowns from our educator — learn to understand what's happening in crypto education and why.
Ask questions inside the Telegram group and learn from instructor updates, member discussions, and shared market context.
Join 500+ active learners sharing insights, market observations, and educational discussions.
Video lessons, walkthroughs, and step-by-step guides to build your crypto education knowledge from absolute beginner level.
Learn risk concepts, personal responsibility, and safer education habits from day one.

instructor.label: Meet Your Educator
instructor.name: TP Club Instructor
instructor.role: Lead Educator & Community Founder · TP Club
instructor.bio: With years of hands-on experience in crypto education, our lead educator has helped hundreds of Chinese-Australian learners understand the space more confidently. Teaching complex education concepts in plain Mandarin and English — no jargon, no hype.

items.name: Li Wei
items.text: 加入TP Club是我做过最好的决定。老师讲解得非常清楚，即使是零基础也能理解。学习氛围也很适合新手。强烈推荐！

items.name: Zhang Mei
items.text: 澳大利亚很难找到中文的加密货币教育资源，TP Club完美填补了这个空白。老师的分析让我真正明白了市场是怎么运作的。

items.name: David Chen
items.text: I was new to crypto education and had no idea where to start. The beginner guides were super clear, and the education group is incredibly helpful. Great community!

youtube.title: Subscribe for TP Club Lessons
youtube.sub: Watch market education clips, beginner walkthroughs, and community updates before your next Telegram discussion.

cta.title: Ready to Start Learning?
cta.sub: Join 500+ learners in Telegram for market education, beginner support, and community discussions.
cta.note: No monthly fee. Education only. Free education bundle included.

items.q: Is this free? What do I need to pay?
items.a: Joining TP Club is completely free. There are no monthly fees charged by us, and the community content is education-focused.

items.q: Is this a scam? Is it safe?
items.a: We operate with full transparency — our educator shares education content inside the group, you keep full control of your own accounts and funds, and we never ask for login credentials or access to your funds.

No. TP Club is an educational community. All content is for learning purposes only. We do not provide personalised financial advice, investment recommendations, account management, or guaranteed results.

items.q: I'm completely new to crypto education. Can I still join?
items.a: Absolutely — beginners are welcome! Our content is designed for people with zero prior experience. We explain beginner concepts, learning methods, market structure, and risk education step by step.
Join the Telegram group and ask inside the community. The group is the main place for TP Club updates, beginner support, and education discussions.

footer.disclaimer: Important: TP Club is an educational community. All content is for learning purposes only and does not constitute financial advice, investment recommendations, brokerage services, account management, or promises of profit. You keep control of your own accounts and funds, and TP Club will never ask for your password, seed phrase, private keys, or access to funds.
footer.copyright: © 2025 TP Club. All rights reserved. · Educational content only.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: TP Club keeps data collection minimal. This page explains what we collect when you contact us, join Telegram, or complete the education onboarding flow.

sections.title: Information we collect
sections.body: We may receive your name, Telegram handle, email address, and information you voluntarily send when contacting the education community. We do not ask for exchange passwords, seed phrases, private keys, or access to your funds.

sections.title: How we use it
sections.body: We use this information to respond to enquiries, confirm community access, provide education support, and improve our onboarding.

sections.title: Third-party services
sections.body: Telegram, hosting providers, and analytics tools may process information under their own privacy policies. Future tracking or analytics integrations will be managed from the admin area before being enabled.

sections.title: Educational disclaimer
sections.body: TP Club provides education only. We do not provide personalised financial advice, brokerage services, account management, or guaranteed results.

contact.title: Contact TP Club
contact.intro: Have a question before joining? Reach out through Telegram and continue the conversation inside the community.
contact.note: Never send passwords, private keys, seed phrases, or exchange login details.

admin.title: Admin Area
admin.intro: This private area is reserved for the single TP Club admin account. Management tools are planned but not enabled yet.

cards.title: Tracking Setup
cards.body: Connect or disconnect analytics, pixels, and campaign tracking tools from one place.

cards.title: Third-Party Integrations
cards.body: Manage Telegram, exchange referral, email, analytics, and future CRM integrations.

cards.title: Blog Management
cards.body: Draft, publish, and localize education articles for English and Chinese learners.

cards.title: Access Control
cards.body: Single-admin login and audit history will be added before this area becomes active.
